name: Amber Handloom Cotton Kurti
description: A warm amber straight-cut kurti in handloom cotton, with a stand collar and tonal button placket. Relaxed, true-to-size fit through the body with a straight hem.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold separately in the first few washes. Machine wash cold gentle cycle thereafter. Do not bleach. Line dry in shade.
fit_notes: Relaxed, true-to-size fit through the body with a straight hem.
